title: StatefulWidget Lifecycle
description: Override the initState method to print a message when the widget is created.
problemStatement:
Stateful widgets have a lifecycle. Create a `StatefulWidget` and override its `initState` method to print `"Widget Created!"` to the console.

**Requirement:** Ensure you call `super.initState()`.
hints: The `initState` method is called exactly once when the widget is inserted into the tree.
